name: TeklaStructuresInfo
summary: The TeklaStructuresInfo class provides information about Tekla Structures.

constructors.name: TeklaStructuresInfo
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the TeklaStructuresInfo class

methods.name: GetBuildNumber
methods.summary: Returns the Tekla Structures build number.

returns.doc: The current buildnumber of Tekla Structures.

methods.name: GetCommonAppDataFolder
methods.summary: Returns (XSDATADIR)environments installation folder of the Tekla Structures as string.

returns.doc: The (XSDATADIR)environments installation folder of the Tekla Structures.

methods.name: GetCopyRightText
methods.summary: Returns the Tekla Structures copyright text as string.

returns.doc: The current copyright text of Tekla Structures.

methods.name: GetCurrentProgramVersion
methods.summary: Returns the current Tekla Structures version.

returns.doc: The current version of Tekla Structures.

methods.name: GetCurrentUser
methods.summary: Returns the current Tekla Structures user.

returns.doc: The current user of Tekla Structures.

methods.name: GetFullTSRegistryKeyText
methods.summary: Returns full registry key of the Tekla Structures as string.

returns.doc: The full registry key of the Tekla Structures.

methods.name: GetLocalAppDataFolder
methods.summary: Returns (XSUSERDATADIR) user's local appdata folder of the Tekla Structures as string.

returns.doc: The (XSUSERDATADIR)user's local appdata folder of the Tekla Structures.

methods.name: GetPluginsFolder
methods.summary: Returns main TS plugins folder, not extensions folder

methods.name: GetRevisionDate
methods.summary: Returns the Tekla Structures revision date as string.

returns.doc: The current revision date of Tekla Structures.
